message: Performance goal created with evaluator contract

evidence: Implemented Phase 3 TypeScript import/export resolution: AST import edges now carry named/default bindings; topology import resolver supports relative imports and index files; export index maps exported symbols; symbol resolver upgrades import edges to target file symbols and imported call edges to real exported symbol IDs with targetFile/resolution metadata; traceFlow and ContextPack topology expose targetFile. Regression tests cover relative index import resolution, alias imported call resolution, impact_analysis cross-file callers, trace_flow targetFile, and context topology target files. Evaluator passed: bun run check && bun run test && bun run build.

Tests cover all acceptance criteria.
